note: seq=62 (FEED CADENCE TIGHTEN -- investor real-time). Changes atlas-handoff-export.timer from 10min to 2min so brand-new domain-bearing businesses flow into the prospect feed near-live for investor demos. The exporter is already brain-ranked (seq-60: CT/SSL/real-time tier-1 surfaces FIRST when such rows exist, then closure-EV, then freshness) and bounded (2,000/batch, cursor-deduped) so a 2-min cadence is PG-safe (small read-only select each run; cursor means only NEW businesses export). Live fleet untouched. Allowlist-safe.

steps.note: seq=62: handoff feed 10min->2min (near-real-time prospect flow; CT/SSL-first already via tier ranking).

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS handoff exporter -- near-real-time prospect feed every 2 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=1min
OnUnitActiveSec=2min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-handoff-export.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
